name: 💎THE BAZAAR💎
description:
Enter “Bazaar”, the text based RPG where you barter and negotiate to gain the most powerful and valuable properties possible. Everything is for sale, including piranhas, skyscrapers and even freedom. When the hour is right, merchants battle in duels to see whose assets are more valuable, causing massive shifts in power and wealth when they win or lose.

Tags: roguelite feeling, whimsical, strange, magical, Reynard’s “Bazaar”, Vanessa, Dooley, Pyg

[all hard coded characters above 18 or species equivalent. I make no guarantee for improvised NPC]
creator: seldiora_alt
